phrases.tokens_html: 他们来找更多东西。
phrases.translation: They come for more.

phrases.tokens_html: 就是为什么要走了。
phrases.translation: That's why you're leaving.

phrases.tokens_html: 我们又去时间点。
phrases.translation: Let's go back to time.

phrases.tokens_html: 再拿几个孩子出来。
phrases.translation: Get a few more kids out.

phrases.tokens_html: 她得到了一样的家。
phrases.translation: She got the same home.

phrases.tokens_html: 什么也不能让你看到。
phrases.translation: Can't let you see anything.

phrases.tokens_html: 那么多人需要帮忙。
phrases.translation: So many people need help.

phrases.tokens_html: 叫他们准备好听我说。
phrases.translation: Get them ready to listen to me.

phrases.tokens_html: 然后把它带到里面。
phrases.translation: Then bring it inside.

phrases.tokens_html: 下一次我们一起出去。
phrases.translation: Let's go out together next time.

phrases.tokens_html: 这些事情可能很快就会发生。
phrases.translation: These things could happen very quickly.

phrases.tokens_html: 你们可以告诉我什么？
phrases.translation: What can you guys tell me?

phrases.tokens_html: 让我们看看怎么样吧。
phrases.translation: Let's see how it goes.

phrases.tokens_html: 他们认为这个工作太难了。
phrases.translation: They think the job is too difficult.

phrases.tokens_html: 妈妈叫我们回家。
phrases.translation: Mom called us home.

phrases.tokens_html: 他们可能不相信我们。
phrases.translation: They may not believe us.

phrases.tokens_html: 这样就可以有更多的钱。
phrases.translation: That way you can have more money.

phrases.tokens_html: 只是准备好了让他们见到。
phrases.translation: Just be ready for them to meet.

phrases.tokens_html: 听说他们要去旅行。
phrases.translation: I heard they are going on a trip.

phrases.tokens_html: 一样的事情可以发生在这里。
phrases.translation: The same thing can happen here.

phrases.tokens_html: 不要抱歉，这是我的错。
phrases.translation: Don't be sorry, it's my fault.

phrases.tokens_html: 我们要尽快完成任务。
phrases.translation: We need to complete the task as soon as possible.

phrases.tokens_html: 有什么可以帮助你们？
phrases.translation: How can I help you?

phrases.tokens_html: 谢谢你们一直对我好。
phrases.translation: Thank you for always being nice to me.

phrases.tokens_html: 对不起，我不能做到。
phrases.translation: Sorry, I can't do it.

phrases.tokens_html: 让我们开始准备吧。
phrases.translation: Let's get started.

phrases.tokens_html: 爸爸也许会给我们带来礼物。
phrases.translation: Dad might bring us presents.

phrases.tokens_html: 今天我们可以一起去玩吗？
phrases.translation: Can we go play together today?

phrases.tokens_html: 现在我们有朋友可以和我们一起玩。
phrases.translation: Now we have friends we can play with.

phrases.tokens_html: 这么多的事情发生了，我们该怎么办？
phrases.translation: With so much going on, what should we do?

phrases.tokens_html: 只有一个人知道这里发生了什么。
phrases.translation: Only one person knows what's going on here.

phrases.tokens_html: 最后我们可以回家吃饭了。
phrases.translation: Finally we can go home and eat.

phrases.tokens_html: 也许我们可以找到一个解决方案。
phrases.translation: Maybe we can find a solution.

zh|吃饭.definition: to have a meal; to eat; to make a living

zh|家.definition:
see 傢伙|家伙[jia1 huo5]; 
; home; family; (polite) my (sister, uncle etc)

zh|看看.definition: to take a look at; to examine; to survey

zh|起.definition: to rise; to raise; to get up

zh|叫.definition: to shout; to call; to order

zh|出来.definition: to come out; to appear; to arise; (after a verb, indicates coming out, completion of an action, or ability to discern or detect);

zh|发生.definition: to happen; to occur; to take place

zh|吗.definition:
see 嗎啡|吗啡, morphine; 
; (question particle for "yes-no" questions);

zh|那么.definition: like that; in that way; or so

zh|这么.definition: so much; this much; how much?

zh|你.definition: you (informal, as opposed to courteous 您[nin2]);

zh|让.definition: to yield; to permit; to let sb do sth

zh|会.definition: can (i.e. have the skill, know how to); likely to; sure to; to balance an account; accountancy; accounting

zh|告诉.definition:
to press charges; to file a complaint; 
; to tell; to inform; to let know

zh|来.definition: to come; to arrive; to come round

zh|把.definition: to hold; to contain; to grasp; handle;

zh|现在.definition: now; at present; at the moment

zh|拿.definition: to hold; to seize; to catch

zh|次.definition: next in sequence; second; the second (day, time etc)

zh|东西.definition:
east and west; 
; thing; stuff; person

zh|带来.definition: to bring; to bring about; to produce

zh|听说.definition: to hear (sth said); one hears (that); hearsay

zh|也.definition: also; too; (in Classical Chinese) final particle implying affirmation

zh|玩.definition: to play; to have fun; to trifle with

zh|给.definition: to; for; for the benefit of; to supply; to provide;

zh|说.definition:
to persuade; 
; to speak; to say; to explain

zh|需要.definition: to need; to want; to demand

zh|只有.definition: only have ...; there is only ...; (used in combination with 才[cai2]) it is only if one ... (that one can ...) (Example: 只有通過治療才能痊愈|只有通过治疗才能痊愈[zhi3 you3 tong1 guo4 zhi4 liao2 cai2 neng2 quan2 yu4] "the only way to cure it is with therapy")

zh|一起.definition: in the same place; together; with

zh|好.definition: good; well; proper; to be fond of; to have a tendency to; to be prone to

zh|解决.definition: to settle (a dispute); to resolve; to solve

zh|只.definition:
only; merely; just; grain that has begun to ripen; 
; classifier for birds and certain animals, one of a pair, some utensils, vessels etc;

zh|就是.definition: (emphasizes that sth is precisely or exactly as stated); precisely; exactly

zh|帮忙.definition: to help; to lend a hand; to do a favor

zh|尽快.definition: as quickly as possible; as soon as possible; with all speed; see 儘快|尽快[jin3 kuai4];

zh|为.definition: as (in the capacity of); to take sth as; to act as; because of; for; to

zh|这样.definition: this kind of; so; this way

zh|得到.definition: to get; to obtain; to receive

zh|有.definition: to have; there is; there are

zh|知道.definition: to know; to become aware of; also pr. [zhi1 dao5]

zh|走.definition: to walk; to go; to run

zh|回.definition: to circle; to go back; to turn around; to curve; to return; to revolve

zh|相信.definition: to be convinced (that sth is true); to believe; to accept sth as true

zh|找.definition: to try to find; to look for; to call on sb

zh|了.definition: (completed action marker); (modal particle indicating change of state, situation now); (modal particle intensifying preceding clause); (of eyes) bright; clear-sighted; to understand clearly

zh|要.definition: to demand; to request; to coerce; important; vital; to want

zh|抱歉.definition: to be sorry; to feel apologetic; sorry!

zh|吧.definition: bar (loanword) (serving drinks, or providing Internet access etc); to puff (on a pipe etc); (onom.) bang; (modal particle indicating suggestion or surmise); ...right?; ...OK?; (onom.) smack!;

zh|办.definition: to do; to manage; to handle

zh|工作.definition: to work; (of a machine) to operate; job

zh|去.definition: to go; to go to (a place); (of a time etc) last

zh|这.definition: this; these; (commonly pr. [zhei4] before a classifier, esp. in Beijing)

zh|一直.definition: straight (in a straight line); continuously; always

zh|认为.definition: to believe; to think; to consider
